attributeSets.name: Elec-M&W-Smartphones & Tablets
attributeSets.mdRules:
# Mapping Logic Governance Instruction Set
## Category: Elec-M&W-Smartphones & Tablets

Use only approved headers. Map only explicitly available data. Do not infer missing values. Leave unavailable fields blank. Do not write "Not specified", "N/A", or placeholders.

---

## Global Rules

- Use clean ecommerce-ready values
- Do not use promotional words such as premium, best, perfect, superior
- Do not use ® or ™ symbols
- Use spaced units: 8 GB, 512 GB, 50 MP, 5000 mAh, 45 W, 120 Hz
- Use screen size as `6.7 inches`, not `6.7-inch`
- Use weight as `<weight> kg`
- Use dimensions as `Wxx x Dxx x Hxx cm`
- Use display resolution as `<width> x <height> Pixel`
- Do not infer color, material, IP rating, NFC, SIM type, charger-in-box, or country of origin
- `name` and `attributes__product_title` must be identical unless instructed otherwise

---

## Title Rules

### Smartphone title format

`Brand + Model Name + 4G/5G + Smartphone, RAM + Storage + Color + Model Number`

Example:

`Lenovo P10 5G Smartphone, 8 GB RAM, 512 GB Storage, White, LP10WHT`

Rules:
- Include brand and model name
- Include 4G or 5G only if provided
- Include RAM and storage when available
- Include color only if explicitly provided
- Add model number at the end when available
- Do not infer network, color, or model number

### Tablet title format

`Brand + Model Name + Connectivity + Tablet, Storage + Color + Model Number`

Example:

`Lenovo Tab P12 Wi-Fi Tablet, 256 GB Storage, Storm Grey, ZACH0175AE`

Rules:
- Use Wi-Fi, Wi-Fi + Cellular, 4G, or 5G only if provided
- Include chipset only if user/product data requires it
- Include year only if provided
- Include color and model number only if provided

---

## Bullet Point Rules

Use exactly 6 bullet points when enough data is available.

Each bullet must be **15–20 words long**.

### Smartphone bullet order

1. Display
2. Processor
3. RAM and storage
4. Camera
5. Battery and charging
6. OS, connectivity, sensors, IP rating, or special features

### Tablet bullet order

1. Display
2. Processor/chipset
3. Storage
4. OS/productivity feature
5. Camera/audio/battery
6. Connectivity and special features

Rules:
- Use sentence case
- Do not end bullets with full stops
- Keep bullets factual and based only on provided data
- Do not repeat the same information unnecessarily

---

## Product Description Rules

`attributes__product_description` must be minimum **200 words**.

Rules:
- Use 3 paragraphs
- Minimum 200 words
- Neutral ecommerce tone
- Use only provided data
- Do not add unsupported claims
- Do not mention warranty unless provided
- Do not use phrases like:
  - "The product title identifies it as..."
  - "As stated on the package"

---

## Header Mapping Rules

| Header | Mapping instruction |
|---|---|
| sku | Exact SKU from source |
| base_code | Exact base code from source |
| attributes__lulu_ean | Exact EAN/barcode, numbers only |
| attributes__shipping_weight | Shipping weight only, do not use product weight unless specified |
| attributes__keywords | Comma-separated SEO keywords using product type, RAM, storage, network, display, camera, OS, and key features |
| attributes__brand | Brand only |
| name | Same as `attributes__product_title` |
| attributes__product_title | Clean ecommerce title using approved smartphone/tablet title format |
| attributes__bullet_point_1 | Display feature, 10–15 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_2 | Processor/chipset, 10–15 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_3 | RAM and storage, 10–15 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_4 | Camera, 10–15 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_5 | Battery and charging, 10–15 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_6 | OS, connectivity, sensors, IP rating, or special feature, 10–15 words |
| attributes__product_description | 3 paragraphs, minimum 150 words, factual and neutral |
| attributes__product_type | Smartphone or Tablet |
| attributes__model | Official model name/code only |
| attributes__model_year | Year only if provided |
| attributes__color | Color only if explicitly provided |
| attributes__weight | Product weight only, format as `<weight> kg` |
| attributes__product_dimensions | Product dimensions only, format as `Wxx x Dxx x Hxx cm` |
| attributes__material | Material only if explicitly provided |
| attributes__ip_rating | Official IP rating only, e.g. IP54, IP67, IP68 |
| attributes__in_the_box | Listed box contents only |
| attributes__country_of_origin | Country only if provided |
| attributes__screen_size | Display size, e.g. `6.7 inches` |
| attributes__display_type | Display panel/type, e.g. AMOLED, OLED, IPS LCD |
| attributes__display_resolution | Resolution, e.g. `1080 x 2400 Pixel` |
| attributes__brightness | Brightness value, e.g. `1300 nits` |
| attributes__refresh_rate | Refresh rate, e.g. `120 Hz` |
| attributes__os | OS name/version, e.g. Android 15, iPadOS 18 |
| attributes__os_version | UI/software version, e.g. One UI 7, XOS 15 |
| attributes__processor | Processor family only: Qualcomm Snapdragon, Apple, Samsung Exynos, MediaTek, or Unisoc |
| attributes__version | Chipset/platform version or variant version only if clearly provided |
| attributes__gpu | GPU only if provided |
| attributes__ram | RAM only, e.g. `8 GB` |
| attributes__storage_type | Storage technology only, e.g. UFS 2.2 |
| attributes__internal_storage | Built-in storage only, e.g. `256 GB` |
| attributes__external_storage | Expandable storage support only |
| attributes__camera_features | Camera features such as OIS, PDAF, HDR, night mode |
| attributes__camera_resolution | MP summary format: `Rear = 50 MP + 12 MP + 2 MP, Front = 32 MP` |
| attributes__primary_camera | Rear/main camera setup with detailed specs if provided |
| attributes__secondary_camera | Front/selfie camera setup with detailed specs if provided |
| attributes__video_recording | Video specs only, e.g. `4K at 30 fps` |
| attributes__flash | Flash type only, e.g. LED flash |
| attributes__network | Mobile network only, e.g. 4G LTE, 5G |
| attributes__sim | SIM configuration only |
| attributes__bluetooth | Bluetooth version only, e.g. `v5.4`, `v6.0` |
| attributes__wifi | Wi-Fi generation only, e.g. Wi-Fi 5, Wi-Fi 6, Wi-Fi 6E, Wi-Fi 7 |
| attributes__nfc | NFC support only if stated |
| attributes__usb | USB connector/standard only |
| attributes__ports | Physical ports only |
| attributes__sensors | Listed sensors only |
| attributes__charging_speed | Charging wattage/speed only |
| attributes__battery_capacity | Battery capacity only |
| attributes__battery_type | Battery chemistry only, e.g. Lithium Ion, Lithium Polymer |
| attributes__battery_life | Battery runtime/life claim only if provided |
| attributes__charging_type | Charging method, e.g. USB-C charging, wireless charging |
| attributes__audio | Speaker/audio features |
| attributes__special_features | Important features not mapped elsewhere |
| attributes__other_information | Relevant leftover specs only |

---

## Processor Mapping Rules

Map `attributes__processor` as processor family only.

Accepted values:

- `Qualcomm Snapdragon`
- `Apple`
- `Samsung Exynos`
- `MediaTek`
- `Unisoc`

Examples:

| Source value | Output |
|---|---|
| Qualcomm Snapdragon 7s Gen 2 | Qualcomm Snapdragon |
| Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 | Qualcomm Snapdragon |
| Apple A18 | Apple |
| Apple M4 | Apple |
| Samsung Exynos 1580 | Samsung Exynos |
| MediaTek Dimensity 7300 | MediaTek |
| MediaTek Helio G99 | MediaTek |
| Unisoc T606 | Unisoc |

Do not include chipset model, clock speed, GPU, RAM, or storage in this field.

---

## Camera Resolution Mapping Rules

Map `attributes__camera_resolution` using this exact format:

`Rear = 50 MP + 12 MP + 2 MP, Front = 32 MP`

Rules:
- Use `Rear =` for rear camera setup
- Use `Front =` for front/selfie camera
- Separate multiple rear cameras using `+`
- Keep only MP values in this field
- Do not include aperture, lens type, OIS, PDAF, HDR, or video specs

---

## Connectivity Normalization

| Field | Required style |
|---|---|
| attributes__bluetooth | `v5.4`, `v6.0` |
| attributes__wifi | `Wi-Fi 5`, `Wi-Fi 6`, `Wi-Fi 6E`, `Wi-Fi 7` |
| attributes__network | `4G LTE`, `5G` |
| attributes__usb | `USB Type-C`, `USB Type-C 2.0` |

Rules:
- Convert `Bluetooth 5.4` to `v5.4`
- Convert `Bluetooth 6.0` to `v6.0`
- Convert `802.11ac` to `Wi-Fi 5` only when clear
- Convert `802.11ax` to `Wi-Fi 6` or `Wi-Fi 6E` only when clear
- Do not mix network, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, USB, and ports

---

## Battery Mapping Rules

| Field | Correct mapping |
|---|---|
| attributes__battery_capacity | Battery capacity only, e.g. `5000 mAh` |
| attributes__battery_type | Battery chemistry only, e.g. `Lithium Ion` |
| attributes__charging_speed | Charging wattage only, e.g. `45 W` |
| attributes__charging_type | Charging method, e.g. `USB-C charging` |
| attributes__battery_life | Runtime claim only if provided |

Rules:
- Use `Lithium Ion`, not `Li-Ion`
- Use `Lithium Polymer`, not `Li-Po`
- Do not infer battery type
- Do not estimate battery life from mAh
- Do not assume fast charging from USB-C

---

## Field Separation Rules

| Data | Correct header |
|---|---|
| RAM | attributes__ram |
| Built-in storage | attributes__internal_storage |
| Storage technology | attributes__storage_type |
| Rear camera details | attributes__primary_camera |
| Front camera details | attributes__secondary_camera |
| Camera MP summary | attributes__camera_resolution |
| Camera features | attributes__camera_features |
| Battery capacity | attributes__battery_capacity |
| Charging wattage | attributes__charging_speed |
| Charging method | attributes__charging_type |
| Mobile network | attributes__network |
| Wi-Fi | attributes__wifi |
| Bluetooth | attributes__bluetooth |
| USB type | attributes__usb |
| Physical ports | attributes__ports |
| Product weight | attributes__weight |
| Shipping weight | attributes__shipping_weight |
| Box contents | attributes__in_the_box |

---

## Final QC Checklist

Before output, verify:

- No invented or inferred values
- No placeholder values
- `name` and `attributes__product_title` match
- Title follows approved format
- Color is mapped only if explicitly provided
- Material is mapped only if explicitly provided
- Processor is mapped as family only
- Camera resolution follows `Rear = ..., Front = ...`
- Bluetooth uses `v5.4` style
- Wi-Fi uses `Wi-Fi 6E` style
- Battery type uses `Lithium Ion` style
- RAM and storage are separated correctly
- Network, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, USB, and ports are separated correctly
- Each bullet point has 10–15 words
- Product description has minimum 150 words in 3 paragraphs

attributeSets.name: Elec-C&A-Laptops
attributeSets.mdRules:
Mapping Logic Governance Instruction Set
## Category: Elec-M&W-Laptops

Use only approved headers. Map only explicitly available data. Do not infer missing values. Leave unavailable fields blank. Do not write "Not specified", "N/A", or placeholders.

---

## Global Rules

* Use clean ecommerce-ready values.
* Do not use promotional words such as premium, lightning-fast, ultra-thin, superior.
* Do not use ® or ™ symbols.
* Use spaced units: 16 GB, 1 TB, 65 W, 144 Hz, 54 Wh.
* Use screen size as `15.6 inches`, not `15.6-inch` or `15.6"`.
* Use weight as `<weight> kg`.
* Use dimensions as `Wxx x Dxx x Hxx cm`.
* Use display resolution as `<width> x <height> Pixel`.
* Do not infer color, material, port availability, backlit keyboard status, or country of origin.
* `name` and `attributes__product_title` must be identical unless instructed otherwise.

---

## Title Rules

### Laptop title format

`Brand + Model Family + Model Name + [Gaming] Laptop, Screen Size, Processor, RAM, Storage, OS, Color, Part Number`

Example:
`Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11 Laptop, 14 inches, Intel Core i7, 16 GB RAM, 512 GB SSD, Windows 11 Pro, Black, 21HM000KUS`

Rules:
* Include "Gaming" before Laptop only if it is explicitly marketed as a gaming laptop.
* Include brand, model family (e.g., IdeaPad, ROG, MacBook Air), and specific model name.
* Include screen size, processor family, RAM, and total storage.
* Include OS and color only if explicitly provided.
* Add the exact part number (MPN) at the end when available.
* Do not infer OS, color, or part number.

---

## Bullet Point Rules

Use exactly 6 bullet points when enough data is available.
Each bullet must be **15–20 words long**.

### Laptop bullet order

1. Display, panel type, and resolution
2. Processor, generation, and graphics card
3. RAM and storage configuration
4. Keyboard, touchpad, webcam, and audio
5. Battery capacity, power adapter, and estimated life
6. Operating system, connectivity (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth), and physical ports

Rules:
* Use sentence case.
* Do not end bullets with full stops.
* Keep bullets factual and based only on provided data.
* Do not repeat the same information unnecessarily across bullets.

---

## Product Description Rules

`attributes__product_description` must be minimum **200 words**.

Rules:
* Use 3 paragraphs.
* Minimum 200 words.
* Neutral ecommerce tone.
* Use only provided data.
* Do not add unsupported performance claims (e.g., "This laptop will run any game flawlessly").
* Do not mention warranty unless provided.
* Do not use phrases like "According to the spec sheet" or "As seen in the images."

---

## Header Mapping Rules

| Header | Mapping instruction |
| :--- | :--- |
| sku | Exact SKU from source |
| base_code | Exact base code from source |
| attributes__lulu_ean | Exact EAN/barcode, numbers only |
| attributes__shipping_weight | Shipping weight only, do not use product weight unless specified |
| attributes__keywords | Comma-separated SEO keywords (product type, processor, RAM, storage, GPU, display, OS) |
| attributes__brand | Brand only (e.g., HP, Dell, ASUS, Apple) |
| name | Same as `attributes__product_title` |
| attributes__product_title | Clean ecommerce title using approved laptop title format |
| attributes__bullet_point_1 | Display and resolution, 15–20 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_2 | Processor and graphics, 15–20 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_3 | RAM and storage, 15–20 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_4 | Keyboard, touchpad, webcam, and audio, 15–20 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_5 | Battery and power, 15–20 words |
| attributes__bullet_point_6 | OS, connectivity, and ports, 15–20 words |
| attributes__product_description | 3 paragraphs, minimum 200 words, factual and neutral |
| attributes__lulu_product_type | Laptop or Gaming Laptop |
| attributes__model | Official model family/name only (e.g., XPS 15, Pavilion 14) |
| attributes__part_number | Manufacturer Part Number (MPN) only |
| attributes__model_year | Year only if provided |
| attributes__color | Color only if explicitly provided |
| attributes__weight | Product weight only, format as `<weight> kg` |
| attributes__product_dimensions | Product dimensions only, format as `Wxx x Dxx x Hxx cm` |
| attributes__in_the_box | Listed box contents only |
| attributes__country_of_origin | Country only if provided |
| attributes__accessories | Bundled accessories only (e.g., stylus, mouse, carrying sleeve) |
| attributes__screen_size | Display size, e.g. `14 inches`, `15.6 inches` |
| attributes__display_type | Display panel/technology, e.g., IPS, OLED, Mini LED |
| attributes__display_feature | Surface/touch treatments, e.g., Anti-glare, Touchscreen |
| attributes__refresh_rate | Refresh rate, e.g. `60 Hz`, `144 Hz` |
| attributes__display_resolution | Resolution, e.g. `1920 x 1080 Pixel`, `2560 x 1600 Pixel` |
| attributes__brightness | Brightness value, e.g. `400 nits` |
| attributes__processor | Processor family only (See Processor Mapping Rules below) |
| attributes__version | Processor generation/series only, e.g., 13th Gen, Ryzen 7000 Series |
| attributes__ram | Total RAM, e.g. `16 GB` |
| attributes__storage | Total combined storage, e.g. `1 TB` |
| attributes__hdd | Hard drive capacity only if applicable, e.g. `1 TB HDD` |
| attributes__ssd | Solid state drive capacity only if applicable, e.g. `512 GB SSD` |
| attributes__graphics | Type of graphics, e.g., Integrated Graphics, Dedicated Graphics |
| attributes__graphic_memory | VRAM amount and type only, e.g. `8 GB GDDR6` |
| attributes__graphics_card | GPU model name only, e.g. NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060, Intel Iris Xe |
| attributes__os | Base Operating System, e.g. Windows 11 Home, macOS Sonoma |
| attributes__os_version | Specific OS build or architecture if explicitly provided (e.g., 64-bit) |
| attributes__wifi | Wi-Fi generation only, e.g. Wi-Fi 5, Wi-Fi 6, Wi-Fi 6E, Wi-Fi 7 |
| attributes__bluetooth | Bluetooth version only, e.g. `v5.3`, `v5.4` |
| attributes__usb | USB standard/type breakdown, e.g., 2 x USB Type-C, 1 x USB 3.2 |
| attributes__hdmi | HDMI standard/port, e.g., HDMI 2.1 |
| attributes__ports | All other physical ports, e.g., 3.5mm Audio Jack, SD Card Reader |
| attributes__ethernet | Ethernet/LAN details, e.g., RJ45 (10/100/1000 Mbps) |
| attributes__battery_capacity | Battery watt-hours or cell count, e.g. `54 Wh`, `3-cell` |
| attributes__battery_type | Battery chemistry only, e.g. Lithium Ion, Lithium Polymer |
| attributes__battery_life | Runtime claim only if explicitly provided |
| attributes__power | Power adapter wattage, e.g. `65 W`, `240 W` |
| attributes__mic | Microphone array details |
| attributes__audio | Speaker setup/certifications, e.g., 2 x 2W Speakers, Dolby Atmos |
| attributes__web_camera | Webcam resolution/features, e.g., 1080p FHD Camera, IR Camera |
| attributes__keyboard_&_touchpad | Keyboard/touchpad features, e.g., Backlit Keyboard, Numeric Keypad |
| attributes__features | Important features not mapped elsewhere, e.g., Fingerprint Reader, TPM 2.0 |
| attributes__other_information | Relevant leftover specs only |

---

## Processor Mapping Rules

Map `attributes__processor` as the overarching processor family. Put the generation or specific series in `attributes__version`.

Accepted values:
* `Intel Core i3` / `i5` / `i7` / `i9` / `Ultra 5` / `Ultra 7`
* `AMD Ryzen 3` / `5` / `7` / `9`
* `Apple M1` / `M2` / `M3` / `M4` (Include Pro/Max if applicable)
* `Qualcomm Snapdragon`
* `Intel Celeron` / `Intel Pentium`

Examples:

| Source value | Output `attributes__processor` | Output `attributes__version` |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Intel Core i7-13700H | Intel Core i7 | 13th Gen |
| AMD Ryzen 7 7735HS | AMD Ryzen 7 | 7000 Series |
| Apple M3 Pro 11-core | Apple M3 Pro | (Leave blank) |
| Snapdragon X Elite | Qualcomm Snapdragon | X Series |

---

## Graphics & Storage Mapping Rules

Laptops frequently mix integrated/dedicated GPUs and SSD/HDDs. Separate them strictly.

### Storage
* `attributes__storage`: Total capacity across all drives (e.g., `1.5 TB`).
* `attributes__ssd`: SSD only (e.g., `512 GB SSD`).
* `attributes__hdd`: HDD only (e.g., `1 TB HDD`).

### Graphics
* `attributes__graphics_card`: The actual name of the GPU (e.g., `NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070`, `AMD Radeon Graphics`).
* `attributes__graphic_memory`: VRAM only (e.g., `8 GB GDDR6`). Do not put VRAM inside the graphics card name.
* `attributes__graphics`: The category (e.g., `Dedicated Graphics`, `Integrated Graphics`).

---

## Connectivity Normalization

| Field | Required style |
| :--- | :--- |
| attributes__bluetooth | `v5.3`, `v5.4` |
| attributes__wifi | `Wi-Fi 5`, `Wi-Fi 6`, `Wi-Fi 6E`, `Wi-Fi 7` |
| attributes__hdmi | `HDMI 2.0`, `HDMI 2.1` |

Rules:
* Convert `Bluetooth 5.3` to `v5.3`.
* Convert `802.11ax` to `Wi-Fi 6` or `Wi-Fi 6E` only when clear.
* Do not lump USB, HDMI, and Ethernet into a single ports field if specific headers exist. Use `attributes__ports` only for leftovers (like SD card readers or audio jacks).

---

## Field Separation Rules

| Data | Correct header |
| :--- | :--- |
| RAM capacity | attributes__ram |
| Total storage capacity | attributes__storage |
| SSD details | attributes__ssd |
| VRAM capacity | attributes__graphic_memory |
| GPU Name | attributes__graphics_card |
| Screen size | attributes__screen_size |
| Panel type (e.g., OLED) | attributes__display_type |
| Display resolution | attributes__display_resolution |
| USB types/counts | attributes__usb |
| Headphone jack / SD card | attributes__ports |
| Charger wattage | attributes__power |
| Battery capacity (Wh) | attributes__battery_capacity |

---

## Final QC Checklist

Before output, verify:
* No invented or inferred values (especially missing ports or battery life).
* No placeholder values used.
* `name` and `attributes__product_title` match exactly.
* Title follows the approved Laptop format.
* Processor is separated correctly into Family (`attributes__processor`) and Generation (`attributes__version`).
* Storage is split correctly if the laptop has both HDD and SSD.
* Graphics Card name and Graphics Memory are separated.
* Bluetooth uses `v5.3` style.
* Wi-Fi uses `Wi-Fi 6E` style.
* Battery type uses `Lithium Ion` or `Lithium Polymer` style.
* Each bullet point has 15–20 words.
* Product description has minimum 200 words in 3 paragraphs.

globalMappingLogic:
CRITICAL GLOBAL PROTOCOLS:
1. Normalization: Standardize all measurements to proper abbreviations (e.g., "Inches" -> '"', "GigaBytes" -> "GB"). 
2. Precision Extraction: Extract the exact technical specifications. Remove all marketing fluff or adjectives. Example: "Blazing fast Ryzen 5 7530U Processor" -> "AMD Ryzen 5 7530U".
3. Empty Values: If the requested attribute is completely missing from the Source Markdown, do NOT hallucinate or guess entirely unrelated specifications. Output EXACTLY "N/A".
4. Value Isolation: Extract ONLY the value required by the target header without repeating the header name. (e.g., Target: "Processor", Output: "Ryzen 5". NOT "Processor: Ryzen 5").
5. Case Structure: Maintain Title Case for all physical object attributes, and strict uppercase for abbreviated tech standards (e.g., "DDR5", "WUXGA", "IPS").
